subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q1 review | INIT-0845
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of bulldog work in Canberra. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Frida Kahlo. Reference initiative INIT-0845. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: risk, quality.
